title: Ben's Monster Energy Mod
description: All the Monster Energy you could ever want... and Beer too for some reason.
body:
# BEN'S MONSTER ENERGY MOD

![A bunch of Monster Energy cans on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b766d9cfd28df4bfdd32b6d3c9dbe10d6ce6e70c.jpeg)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/m0wdmLYwyoc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Are you as obsessed with Monster Energy as the next guy? Are you even more obssesed? This is the mod for you!

With **OVER 54 FLAVORS** of Monster Energy (including some in different sizes!) this mod has everything you could ever want AND MORE. (Like Beer... for some reason)

_This mod is NOT associated with Monster Energy, Coca Cola, or Red Bull (Wait, why is that last one there???)_

**Please Note: This mod is based on Monster Energy's availability in the USA. Certain flavors labeled as discontinued in this mod may not be discontinued elsewhere!**



# VARIETIES OF MONSTER ENERGY

## Standard Monsters
The most common types of Monster Energies you'll find are the flavors available in 2026. These are basically the ones you'll find on the website

<details>
<summary>The Common Monsters</summary>

![A picture of all the common Monster Energies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b36589e436ba5491565519e19cb6d6c96556ab8b.png)

</details>

## Lost Monsters
In certain structures you may be able to obtain a Lost Monster. These are older flavors of Monster Energy that are currently disconinued (In the US at least). If any of these are your favorite flavor I sympathize.


<details>
<summary>The Lost Monsters</summary>

![A screenshot of all the available Lost Monsters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83b1ecd9ec4e6818110bc729866b72591f57740e.png)

</details>

## The Beast Unleashed

At a specific structure you can find the alcoholic Beast Unleased drinks! These are alcoholic, so please consume in moderation! (Something bad may happen if you don't)

_Please Note: As it is not the priority of this mod the collection of Beast Unleashed drinks is currently less comprehensive than the standard Monster Energy_

<details>
<summary>The Current Beast Unleashed Collection</summary>



![The current collection of The Beast Unleashed drinks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b75ff19d82bd87b6cd7fe544309b1738019b4ab1.png)


</details>


# OBTAINING MONSTER ENERGY
There is currently no way to directly craft Monster Energy. To obtain monster energy you must find one of the 8 Structres added by this mod!

## Villager's Convenience

In specific biomes you will find the convenience store "Villager's Convenience." This is where you will find a cooler of Monster Energy for you to politely obtain.

There are many different variations of the Villager's Convenience depending on the biome!


<details>
<summary>Every Villager's Convenience</summary>

![Plains Villager's Convenience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4104d132414f62512566925fe10dc589619d19d8.jpeg)
Plains Villager's Convenience

![Desert Villager's Conenience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ce283fd3b68219a81052920e59dd42f4b9f1d36.jpeg)
Desert Villager's Convenience

![Jungle Villager's Convenience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d271c5215b25feff463ea692bfdc555af06cf24a.jpeg)
Jungle Villager's Convenience

![Dark Forest Villager's Convenience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8e62f72b0ee21dfe5bd17ad6034fc659cb73f87.jpeg)
Dark Forest Villager's Convenience

![Nether Villager's Convenience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/355c628e7142a31eae868d2c3577f3dd2bc239d5.jpeg)
Nether Villager's Convenience

![The End Villager's Convenience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e925b849b2695c891eb1eeeb9aedf93e28d9f578.jpeg)
The End Villager's Convenience
</details>


## Broken Down Monster Energy Truck

In Deserts and Deep Oceans you may find an old, broken down Monster Energy Delivery Truck. In the surrounding gravel or sand, you will be able to use Brush on the suspicious sand and gravel to find more Monster! Because these trucks may be years old, you might be able to find some disconinued flavors...


<details>
<summary>Monster Energy Trucks</summary>

![Desert Monster Energy Truck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffb7b24c5fef7f8436b069dcfc9040e193ee8379.jpeg)
Desert Monster Energy Truck

![Deep Ocean Monster Energy Truck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a81b3a9708901df7485260df5cbe5bffd92b169a.jpeg)
Deep Ocean Monster Energy Truck

</details>

## Dark Forest Village

In Dark Forests you will be able to find a whole new village!

These villages will always spawn with a **Bar.** Bars are where you will find The Beast Unleashed! You will also find Beer and Wine here!


<details>
<summary>Dark Forest Village</summary>

![Dark Forest Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a476eb9535e7a0b680f5665ba0490f928ed4026.jpeg)
Dark Forest Village

![Dark Forest Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82c777c69634cef813bca0d033cba14a639e4ab0.jpeg)
Dark Forest Bar

![Bar Interior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0cdb38079d3b82bc720cb51754b91df683dde8d.jpeg)
Bar Interior


</details>


# Drinking Monster

## Caffinated

![Effects given when drinking a monster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5defb1dd836a01d216db53398bb4fa98b97882c7.png)

When you drink Monster you will get the "Caffeinated" status effect. The level you get will be based on the size of Monster you drink. You will also be given Haste and Speed (Notably for a shorter period of time than your Caffeinated Effect). If you drink another Monster while you have the Caffeinated Effect, the level of effect you get will increase. If you consume too much Caffeiene in a short amount of time...

## Caffiene Addict

![Caffeine Addict Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1818e3cccf1632ece217a1ae067721a1ed3769f.png)

You will become a Caffeine addict! If you are not Caffeinated while having this effect then you will randomly get withdrawal symptoms. While you are a Caffiene Addict, you will no longer recieve the Haste and Speed you otherwise would be given if drinking Caffiene.

## Drinking Alcohol

When you drink alcoholic beverages you will first get the Tipsy effect. Tipsy on it's own does not do anything, but if you drink another beverage then you will become drunk

While you are drunk, you will stumble around, occasionally getting nausious. The more alcohol you drink while drunk the higher your drunk effect gets and the more common negative effects are. If you are drunk enough you will become hungover after the drunk effects wear off. Let your drunk status effect get too high and you will begin to overdose and die.

Like Caffeine, if you drink too much alcohol in a short period of time you will become an alcoholic. UNLIKE CAFFEINE this is not tracked by an effect similar to "Caffeinated." This is tracked in the background. While you are an alcoholic you will recieve negative effects from time to time. These effects will be harsher than Caffiene Withdrawal. 

TLDR: don't drink too much Alcohol.

# OTHER ITEMS

## Monster Energy Cooler

Can hold 15 items and emits light

<details>
<summary>Monster Energy Cooler</summary>

![Monster Energy Cooler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bf6ea3a2d5dd13399786feb87a7e51f8865135c.jpeg)![Monster Energy Cooler Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/833ff139a15c5d13c21225b2735a05a817d5b4b6.png)

</details>

## Monster Energy Block

A rotational block that when arranged correctly makes a Monster Energy Logo


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Monster Energy Blocks arranged in a way to make the Monster Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25ea003ee73b5261477cbecc6599361c59207e3a.jpeg)![Monster Energy Block Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b62195374cfda51b8468fa66f5423e141be88d24.png)

</details>
